title: Shiny's Mob Vote Revival
description: Brings back those lost in the mob votes.
body: Shiny's Mob Vote Revival This resource pack brings back the mobs that weren't added in previous mob votes. I added my own unique touches, custom textures, and even added a ton of biome-dependant textures! There are over 25 Moobloom variants and the other mobs have a rare chance to spawn anywhere or a higher chance in specific biomes. ShinyDragon96 - Owner, Textures, Models, Organizer Complete Simplistic Pack — ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack Realistic Entities — Shiny's Entity Models Plus! Green Screens — Shiny's Green Screen! Shiny's Mob Vote Revival© 2021 by ShinyDragon96 is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0 ! - If you use this pack in a video, post, or anything else, it must be linked back to here & credited in my name - !
